// This file is auto-generated. Do not edit manually.
// Structure: BinarySearch
#include <array>
#include <cstring>
#include <cstdint>
#include <limits>
#include <string_view>

class fastdata final {
    static constexpr std::array<char, 3> keys = {
        0, 97, 127
    };

    public:
    [[nodiscard]]
    static constexpr bool contains(const char key) noexcept {


        size_t lo = 0;
        size_t hi = 3;
        while (lo < hi) {
            const size_t mid = lo + ((hi - lo) >> 1);
            const char mid_key = keys[mid];
            const int32_t order = mid_key < key ? -1 : (mid_key > key ? 1 : 0);

            if (order == 0)
                return true;
            if (order < 0)
                lo = mid + 1;
            else
                hi = mid;
        }

        return false;
    }

    static constexpr size_t item_count = 3;
    static constexpr char min_key = 0;
    static constexpr char max_key = 127;
};
